alternatives.transcript: If this is a medical emergency, please hang up and dial 911. You are speaking with How can I help you? I need to speak to a live person. I can often help right away. Is this about an appointment, medications, or something else? Medications I can help with many medication requests right away. Are you looking for a prescription refill, a change to your medication, or something else related to your medication? Prescription refill To help with your prescription refill, what is your 1st name? And what is your date of birth? Onetwenty fournineteen 69 Please wait while I find your record. I have found your record. What is the name and dosage of the medication you need a refill for? Enbrel Could you please tell me the name and dosage of the medication you would like to refill? I did not catch that. Could you please repeat the name and dosage of the medication you need a refill for? Can I speak to a live person please? Can I speak to a live person? I will connect you with our staff so they can assist you directly with your medication request. It looks like I was not able to connect you to a staff member just

paragraphs.transcript:
Speaker 0: If this is a medical emergency, please hang up and dial 911. You are speaking with How can I help you?

Speaker 1: I need to speak to a live person.

Speaker 0: I can often help right away. Is this about an appointment, medications, or something else?

Speaker 1: Medications

Speaker 0: I can help with many medication requests right away. Are you looking for a prescription refill, a change to your medication, or something else related to your medication?

Speaker 1: Prescription refill

Speaker 0: To help with your prescription refill, what is your 1st name? And what is your date of birth?

Speaker 1: Onetwenty fournineteen 69

Speaker 0: Please wait while I find your record. I have found your record. What is the name and dosage of the medication you need a refill for?

Speaker 1: Enbrel

Speaker 0: Could you please tell me the name and dosage of the medication you would like to refill? I did not catch that. Could you please repeat the name and dosage of the medication you need a refill for?

Speaker 1: Can I speak to a live person please? Can I speak to a live person?

Speaker 0: I will connect you with our staff so they can assist you directly with your medication request. It looks like I was not able to connect you to a staff member just

sentences.text: If this is a medical emergency, please hang up and dial 911.
You are speaking with How can I help you?
I need to speak to a live person.
I can often help right away.
Is this about an appointment, medications, or something else?
Medications
I can help with many medication requests right away.
Are you looking for a prescription refill, a change to your medication, or something else related to your medication?
Prescription refill
To help with your prescription refill, what is your 1st name?
And what is your date of birth?
Onetwenty fournineteen 69
Please wait while I find your record.
I have found your record.
What is the name and dosage of the medication you need a refill for?
Enbrel
Could you please tell me the name and dosage of the medication you would like to refill?
I did not catch that.
Could you please repeat the name and dosage of the medication you need a refill for?
Can I speak to a live person please?
Can I speak to a live person?
I will connect you with our staff so they can assist you directly with your medication request.
It looks like I was not able to connect you to a staff member just

utterances.transcript: If this is a medical emergency, please hang up and dial 911. You are speaking with How can I help you?
I need to speak to a live person.
I can often help right away. Is this about an appointment, medications, or something else?
I can help with many medication requests right away. Are you looking for a prescription refill, a change to your medication, or something else related to your medication?
To help with your prescription refill, what is your 1st name?
And what is your date of birth?
Please wait while I find your record. I have found your record. What is the name and dosage of the medication you need a refill for?
Could you please tell me the name and dosage of the medication you would like to refill?
I did not catch that. Could you please repeat the name and dosage of the medication you need a refill for? Can I speak to a live person please? Can I speak to a live person?
I will connect you with our staff so they can assist you directly with your medication request.
It looks like I was not able to connect you to a staff member just
